name: Aldersgate Park
description: Nice park setting in residential neighborhood, playground and basketball courts also available

name: Eljer Park
description: Come play pickleball at Eljer Park in Marysville, OH! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Elysium Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Elysium Tennis Center in Plain City, OH! There are 16 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and lights. Reservations are available.

name: Greenwood Park
description: Greenwood Park is a place to play pickleball in Marysville, OH. There are 2 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Union County Family YMCA
description: Union County Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Marysville, OH. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.
